title: hibbertia laurana
intro: Hibbertia laurana, also known as the Guinea flower, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in Australian bush medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hibbertia laurana include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage. Hibbertia laurana is often prepared in herbal tea or tincture form, and may also be used in topical preparations for skin health and wound care.
